checkIn.title: Check-in Process
steps: Arrive at the building entrance - parking is available in the secure basement
Use the access code {{CODE}}# to enter the building foyer
Take the lift to your designated floor
Key card will be left in the lockbox by the apartment door
Lockbox code will be sent via SMS 24 hours before arrival

checkOut.title: Check-out Process
steps: Please vacate the apartment by 10:00 AM
Ensure all windows, doors and balcony are secured
Turn off all lights, air conditioning and appliances
Place key card back in the lockbox and scramble the code
Dispose of rubbish in the chute on your floor

checkInOut.tip: Tip: Early check-in or late check-out may be available - please enquire at least 48 hours in advance. Additional fees may apply.

parking.title: Parking
parking.description: One secure basement car space included with your stay. Space number will be provided on check-in. Remote control located in apartment. Height clearance 2.1m. No parking in visitor bays - strictly enforced by body corporate.

rideshare.title: Uber & Taxis
rideshare.description: Uber and DiDi are readily available throughout the Gold Coast. Local taxi service: 131 008.

publicTransport.title: G:link Light Rail
publicTransport.description: The G:link light rail stops at Broadbeach South station, just a 3-minute walk from the apartment. The tram connects Broadbeach to Surfers Paradise, Southport, and Helensvale (with train connections to Brisbane).
publicTransport.info: Trams run approximately every 7-15 minutes during peak times. For timetables and real-time updates, visit the TransLink website or download the MyTransLink app.
publicTransport.fares: Go Card is the easiest way to pay. Adult fares start from $3.31 for a single journey. Paper tickets also available from station machines.

airportTransfers.title: Gold Coast Airport Transfers
airportTransfers.description: Gold Coast Airport (Coolangatta) is approximately 25km south of Broadbeach.
airportTransfers.note: Allow 30-40 minutes travel time depending on traffic.

carRental.title: Car Rental
carRental.description: While Broadbeach is very walkable with excellent public transport, a car is useful for exploring the wider Gold Coast region, hinterland, and theme parks.
carRental.note: Major rental companies have desks at Gold Coast Airport and in Surfers Paradise. Book in advance for better rates.

rules.title: No Smoking
rules.description: Smoking is strictly prohibited inside the apartment and on balconies. $500 cleaning fee applies if violated.

rules.title: No Pets
rules.description: Pets are not permitted as per body corporate by-laws

rules.title: Quiet Hours
rules.description: Please respect neighbours - quiet time 10 PM - 7 AM on weekdays, 11 PM - 8 AM weekends

rules.title: Guest Limit
rules.description: Maximum occupancy as per booking. No unregistered guests permitted.

rules.title: No Parties
rules.description: Parties and events strictly prohibited. Body corporate security will remove violators.

rules.title: Recycling
rules.description: Yellow bin for recycling, red bin for general waste. Bins located in kitchen.

rules.title: Pool & Facilities
rules.description: Pool hours 6am-10pm. Children must be supervised. No glass in pool area.

rules.title: Parking
rules.description: One car space only. No parking in visitor bays. Strictly enforced by body corporate.

importantNote.title: Important - Body Corporate Rules
importantNote.message: This apartment is subject to body corporate by-laws. Violations may result in fines, immediate eviction without refund, and loss of security bond. Please respect all residents and building rules.

amenities.name: Kitchen
amenities.description: Modern fully equipped kitchen with dishwasher, microwave, oven, and large fridge/freezer
amenities.instructions: Nespresso coffee machine - pods provided. Dishwasher tablets under sink. Induction cooktop - use magnetic cookware only.

amenities.name: Washer & Dryer
amenities.instructions: Laundry powder provided. Select wash cycle, then dry cycle runs automatically. Takes approximately 3 hours total.

amenities.name: Smart TV & Entertainment
amenities.description: 65" 4K Smart TV with Netflix, Stan, Disney+ and free-to-air
amenities.instructions: Remote on coffee table. Press 'Home' for apps. Login details for streaming services provided in welcome folder.

amenities.name: Air Conditioning
amenities.instructions: Wall panel in living area. Keep between 22-24°C for optimal comfort. Please turn off when leaving the apartment.

amenities.name: Balcony
amenities.description: Private balcony with outdoor furniture and ocean/city views
amenities.instructions: Please keep balcony doors closed when air conditioning is running. No smoking on balcony as per body corporate rules.

amenities.name: Secure Parking
amenities.description: One secure basement car space included
amenities.instructions: Space number will be provided on check-in. Remote control in apartment. Height clearance 2.1m.

amenities.name: Building Facilities
amenities.description: Access to pool, spa, sauna, gym and BBQ area
amenities.instructions: Facilities located on Level 4. Pool hours 6am-10pm. Gym 24/7 access with key card. BBQ bookings via building manager.

recommendations.name: Broadbeach
recommendations.description: Patrolled beach perfect for swimming and surfing

recommendations.name: Surfers Paradise Beach
recommendations.description: Iconic Gold Coast beach with golden sand

recommendations.name: Pacific Fair Shopping Centre
recommendations.description: Major shopping centre with 400+ stores, dining and cinema

recommendations.name: Oasis Shopping Centre
recommendations.description: Boutique shopping with cafes and restaurants

recommendations.name: The Star Gold Coast
recommendations.description: Casino complex with multiple restaurants, bars and entertainment

recommendations.name: Kiyomi
recommendations.description: Modern Japanese restaurant at The Star

recommendations.name: Bam Bam Bakehouse
recommendations.description: Artisan bakery and cafe with excellent coffee

recommendations.name: Elk Espresso
recommendations.description: Popular breakfast spot and specialty coffee

recommendations.name: Kurrawa Beach & Park
recommendations.description: Beach with playground, BBQ facilities and surf club

recommendations.name: Infinity Attraction
recommendations.description: Interactive light and mirror maze experience

recommendations.name: Sea World
recommendations.description: Marine park with rides and animal exhibits

localGuide.tip: Getting Around: G:link light rail stops at Broadbeach South (3 min walk) - connects to Surfers Paradise and Southport. Uber and DiDi readily available. Free parking at Pacific Fair for 3 hours.

alert.title: In Case of Emergency
alert.message: For life-threatening emergencies, always call 000 (Triple Zero) for Police, Fire or Ambulance.

safetyInfo.title: Safety Equipment
items: Fire extinguisher: Located in kitchen cupboard
First aid kit: Bathroom vanity drawer
Emergency exits: Main door and fire stairs at end of corridor
Smoke alarms: Installed throughout apartment (tested quarterly)
Fire evacuation plan: Posted on back of main door

emergency.addressNote: Address for Emergency Services: Broadbeach, Gold Coast, Queensland 4218 (provide specific unit number when calling)
